merk: WARNING: Carry out the work safely and follow all applicable safety requirements. (Read DC-82 and complete DC-85.) This inspection does not require anyone to climb onto the roof.
oppgaver: Inspect the roof tiles for damage. Report any damage to the maintenance coordinator.
Assess whether the roof needs cleaning. Look for moss or other growth. Any repairs should be coordinated with the maintenance coordinator.
Inspect roof flashings and roof vents for corrosion and wear.
Inspect the ridge tiles and their fastening.
Inspect roof ventilation at the eaves.
Ensure insect screens are intact and correctly installed.
Clean the drain grates and downpipes.
Inspect gutters and downpipes for rust or damage.
Check during rainfall that water flows correctly into the gutters.
notatInfo: Record below any issues you discover that you are not able or authorized to correct yourself.
